components.accepted_by: Vishnu (authenticated Kaggle account; email intentionally not stored)
components.derived_artifact_restrictions: No original media or derived crops may be released until terms are recorded.
components.notes: 1950 MP4 files are locally present. Owner confirms authenticated Kaggle acquisition, but the exact listing/release, terms, and package completeness remain unverified; this is not a core blocker unless original-resolution ROI work is activated. D-25 permits extraction of three local-only 320x240 stills for a faculty progress preview; it does not authorize ROI research, a model run, or redistribution. Never upsample 64x64 frames and imply recovered detail.

components.license_name: Owner-authorized internal non-commercial research use of verified Kaggle mirror; raw redistribution prohibited and upstream footage rights qualified
components.accepted_by: Vishnu (authenticated Kaggle account; email intentionally not stored)
components.derived_artifact_restrictions: No raw annotations, media, or crops may be released. Local mapped manifests and aggregates are permitted only with the source citation, exact snapshot digest, and provenance restrictions retained.
components.citation_requirements: Cite the official UCF-Crime source, the Kaggle mirror, and the exact local annotation snapshot digest.
components.notes: The verified Kaggle listing is minmints/ufc-crime-full-dataset, Version 1 (104.89 GB). The local package contains 290 MATLAB interval files, the text-format annotation file, and its README. The text digest, parser output, filename/frame alignment, and boundary validation pass. Intervals must not be described as clean or exhaustive.
